heading: Grant Access to MongoDB Support Only for Database Logs
body:
To grant access to MongoDB support staff to database logs through
the Atlas Administration API, see [Grant MongoDB employee cluster access for one cluster](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-grantgroupclustermongodbemployeeaccess).

You can specify `CLUSTER_DATABASE_LOGS` for the `grantType` field in the request body schema.
